description: Verified header navigation links for okwasniewski (Home), Blog, Portfolio, Videos, and Contact; the 'contact' item is a non-clickable SPAN element on the homepage instead of a link.

issues.name: Contact navigation item is not a link on the homepage
issues.description: Expected: The "contact" item in the navigation header should be a link that routes to /contact on all pages, including the homepage. Actual: The "contact" item in the navigation header is a SPAN element and not a link on the homepage, making it unclickable and unable to route to /contact. On other pages (Blog, Portfolio, Videos), it is a functional link.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ using a mobile viewport (375x812).
Locate the "contact" item in the header navigation.
Observe that it is a SPAN element and not a link.
Attempt to click it and verify that no navigation occurs.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "contact" item in the navigation header should be a link that routes to /contact on all pages, including the homepage.
issues.actualBehavior: The "contact" item in the navigation header is a SPAN element and not a link on the homepage, making it unclickable and unable to route to /contact. On other pages (Blog, Portfolio, Videos), it is a functional link.
